title: Finn's Safari Adventure
synopsis: Young Finn explores the African savanna and makes friends with gentle animals while searching for his lost hat on a magical adventure.

pages.text: Finn loved his red hat. He wore it everywhere he went. Today, Finn was visiting the big savanna with his family. The tall golden grass swayed in the warm wind. "Look at all the animals!" said Finn, pointing excitedly.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes wearing a bright red hat stands in golden savanna grass. Painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm orange sunset colors fill the sky. Bold confident strokes show distant acacia trees and rolling hills.
illustration.alt: Finn wearing his red hat in the savanna landscape

pages.text: Suddenly, a big gust of wind blew Finn's hat right off his head! "My hat!" he cried. The red hat tumbled and rolled across the grass, getting farther and farther away. Finn started to run after it, but it was moving too fast.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes reaching up toward a red hat flying through the air. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes shows golden grass bending in the wind. Warm savanna colors and textured painterly style with bold confident strokes capture the movement.
illustration.alt: Finn's hat blowing away in the wind

pages.text: A friendly giraffe saw Finn looking sad. "What's wrong, little one?" she asked in a gentle voice. "I lost my red hat," Finn said. "Can you help me find it?" The giraffe smiled. "Of course! I'm very tall. I can see far across the savanna."

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes looking up at a kind giraffe with expressive eyes. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors. The giraffe towers above golden grass, painted with bold confident strokes and textured painterly style.
illustration.alt: Finn talking to a friendly giraffe

pages.text: The giraffe stretched her long neck high up. "I see it!" she said. "Your hat is by the big rock near the zebras." A playful monkey swung down from a tree. "I'll help too!" he chattered. "Follow me!" The three new friends walked together through the tall grass.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking between a giraffe and an expressive monkey. Gouache painting with warm orange sunset colors and thick brushstrokes. Golden grass surrounds them, painted with textured painterly style and bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Finn walking with his new animal friends

pages.text: By the big rock, they found three zebras playing with Finn's red hat! "That's my hat!" said Finn. The zebras looked sorry. "We didn't know," said one zebra. "We thought it was a fun toy. Here you go!" The zebra gently gave the hat back to Finn.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes receiving his red hat from expressive zebras near a large rock. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors. The scene is painted with textured painterly style using bold confident strokes and golden grass.
illustration.alt: Zebras returning Finn's hat by the big rock

pages.text: "Thank you all!" said Finn, putting his hat back on his head. "You're the best friends ever!" All the animals smiled. They spent the rest of the day playing together in the warm savanna. Finn never forgot his wonderful adventure and his new animal friends.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes wearing his red hat, surrounded by happy expressive animals including a giraffe, monkey, and zebras. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes captures the orange sunset and golden grass with warm savanna colors, textured painterly style, and bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Finn celebrating with all his new animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What color was Finn's hat?
questions.explanation: Finn's hat was red, and he loved wearing it everywhere he went.

questions.question: Which animal helped Finn first?
questions.explanation: The friendly giraffe was the first animal to ask Finn what was wrong and offer to help.

questions.question: How did the giraffe help Finn?
choices: used her long neck to see far
questions.explanation: The giraffe used her long neck to look far across the savanna and spot Finn's hat.

questions.question: Where did they find Finn's hat?
questions.explanation: The giraffe spotted Finn's hat by the big rock near where the zebras were playing.
